_meta.description: ILM for user-turn-ratings-* (monthly index user-turn-ratings-YYYY.MM; per-turn ground-truth value labels, one doc per trace_id, re-rate overwrites). min_age-based delete from index creation (no rollover write-alias). Retention: 365d (ground-truth labels train the pedagogical/quality model and are the join target for prompt-version analysis — kept to the same horizon as agent-insights-*). warm forcemerge fires at 32d, not the sibling 7d, so the current monthly index is closed before merge (avoids forcemerging a still-written index). Authored in FRE-559; the family documented retention_days:90 in prose but no policy enforced it.
